Drop.title: Drop
Drop.description: A location-based message or photo shared by a user.

content.description: The text content of the drop.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the drop.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the drop.

authorId.description: The UID of the user who created the drop.

authorName.description: The display name of the user who created the drop.

authorPhoto.description: The photo URL of the user who created the drop.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the drop was created.
